observers.installation: Installed once before normal runtime when the Alliance Buildings map preference is disabled.
observers.scheduling: Filters added/removed element nodes, then coalesces work through queueMicrotask.
observers.teardown: Browser document lifetime; not registered in the replaceable Toolkit runtime.
observers.documentReplacement: Tracks SPA navigation with popstate, hashchange, pageshow and load; observes documentElement.

observers.installation: Created lazily only in desktop layout when ResizeObserver exists.
observers.scheduling: Re-applies panel sizing and schedules position after resize.
observers.teardown: runtime.destroy disconnects; stopDesktopPanelWorkspaceObservation unobserves current elements.
observers.documentReplacement: Observed elements are refreshed and stale elements unobserved.

observers.installation: Created lazily for tablet layout when ResizeObserver exists.
observers.teardown: runtime.destroy disconnects; tablet observation reset disconnects/unobserves.
observers.documentReplacement: Map element changes cause observation refresh.

observers.installation: One observer per discovered document/frame context.
observers.scheduling: Filters relevant mutations and debounces a badge scan with runtimeSetTimeout.
observers.documentReplacement: Discovers frames and registers load listeners; new documents get their own observer.

observers.installation: Created only outside Economy Mode when feed identity changes.
observers.teardown: resetMajorIncidentFeedObserver disconnects; runtime.destroy is final owner.
observers.documentReplacement: Disconnected and recreated when feed/header is replaced.

observers.installation: One record per connected toolbar spacer.
observers.teardown: pruneMissionValueHostObservers disconnects stale records; runtime.destroy is final owner.
observers.documentReplacement: Disconnected when spacer/toolbar is no longer connected.

observers.installation: Paired with the host ResizeObserver for each toolbar spacer.
observers.scheduling: Schedules mission-value scan after direct toolbar child changes.
observers.teardown: pruneMissionValueHostObservers disconnects stale records; runtime.destroy is final owner.

observers.installation: One observer per discovered document context.
observers.scheduling: Filters mission-window/frame activity and schedules a 50 ms scan.
observers.documentReplacement: Frame loads schedule rescans; new document contexts receive separate observers.

observers.installation: One observer per mission requirements root record.
observers.scheduling: Filters requirement-relevant mutations and schedules record reconciliation.
observers.teardown: record cleanup disconnects; runtime.destroy is final owner.
observers.documentReplacement: Record is discarded when its root disconnects.

observers.installation: One observer per discovered document context.
observers.scheduling: Filters mission/patient/vehicle activity and schedules scan plus record updates.
observers.documentReplacement: Frame loads and document discovery create observers for replacement contexts.

observers.teardown: Explicitly disconnects and untracks before replacing; runtime.destroy is final owner.
observers.documentReplacement: Rebinds when the credits element identity changes.

observers.installation: Installed only in Alliance Buildings context or while map suppression is enabled.
observers.scheduling: Child-list filter then zero-delay coalesced render.
observers.duplicateGuard: install path returns early from normal boot for the page context
observers.documentReplacement: Body subtree observation covers in-page replacement.

observers.installation: One observer for the current non-body mission root.
observers.scheduling: Schedules bounded scan or resets disconnected/hidden root.
observers.duplicateGuard: Always disconnects previous root observer before binding.

observers.installation: One observer for the current native load-all link.
observers.scheduling: Releases/reschedules when identity, visibility or signature changes.
observers.duplicateGuard: Always disconnects previous link observer before binding.

observers.installation: Singleton body observer only while feature is enabled.
observers.scheduling: Filters relevant child-list changes and debounces a bounded scan.
observers.teardown: stopAutoLoadAllVehicles untracks/disconnects; runtime.destroy is final owner.
observers.documentReplacement: Detects mission-root/native-link replacement and resets stale identities.

observers.installation: Constructed once by guarded boot and connected after core UI readiness.
observers.scheduling: Filters Toolkit-owned mutations, classifies mission/layout/UI removal and debounces runtime work.
observers.teardown: runtime.destroy disconnects; connectMainMutationObserver disconnects before re-targeting.
observers.documentReplacement: Re-targets map and mission roots; body fallback is replaced when stable roots appear.

manualRegistrations.condition: fallback when no stable map or mission root exists
top-level replacement detection while stable roots are observed
